prompt:
Create a highly detailed luxury travel influencer collage poster inspired by a torn-paper scrapbook aesthetic. Use a blonde-haired young woman with short messy golden hair, soft freckles, sharp brown eyes, and elegant facial features. Dress her in an all-black turtleneck, black blazer, black cargo pants, and gold accessories. She is holding a professional DSLR camera and appears in multiple poses across the composition.

The design should feature:
• A large social media profile card on the left with the name "Noor 🌸" and handle "@Noor_ul_ain43"
• Blue verification badge
• Profile bio about AI creator and teacher
• 9,007 followers and 4,654 following
• Torn paper transitions revealing breathtaking alpine mountains, crystal lakes, and adventure landscapes
• Polaroid travel photos pinned around the layout
• Handwritten travel notes and doodles
• Vintage world
